title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page on Chrome browser after the recent update.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Transactions are failing due to payment gateway timeout errors during checkout.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: Users are not receiving email confirmations after completing sign-up.

title: Dashboard charts broken
description: The analytics dashboard is displaying blank charts after the latest deployment.

title: Profile picture upload fails
description: Users receive a 500 internal server error when attempting to upload a profile photo.

title: Search results incorrect
description: The search feature is returning completely unrelated results for specific keyword queries.

title: App crashes on iOS 17
description: The mobile application crashes immediately on launch for all iOS 17 users.

title: Invoice download broken
description: Clicking the download invoice button does nothing on Firefox and Safari browsers.

title: Two-factor auth not working
description: OTP codes sent via SMS are not being accepted during the 2FA login flow.

title: Export to CSV fails
description: The export button throws a JavaScript error when the dataset exceeds 1000 rows.

title: Slow loading on mobile
description: Pages take over 10 seconds to load on mobile data connections in Southeast Asia.

title: Wrong currency displayed
description: Prices are showing in USD instead of the user's local currency set in their profile.

title: Notifications badge missing
description: The notification bell icon no longer shows the unread count badge on the navbar.

title: Account deletion not working
description: Submitting the account deletion request form results in a blank white page with no feedback.

title: Dark mode flickering
description: Switching between light and dark mode causes the entire UI to flicker repeatedly for 2-3 seconds.
